name: 道の駅 竹田
desc: 岡城跡で知られる城下町・竹田市の道の駅。採れたて野菜のレストランと直売所があり、1〜5月はいちご狩りも楽しめる。日本一の生産量を誇るサフランも特産。
descEn: Located in the castle town of Taketa, known for the Oka Castle ruins. Has a restaurant serving fresh-picked vegetables and a market, with strawberry picking available January through May. Saffron, of which the area is Japan's top producer, is another specialty.

name: 道の駅 ながゆ温泉
desc: 文人墨客に愛された湯治場・長湯温泉にある道の駅。標高450mで夏も涼しく、日本一の炭酸泉「御前湯」や、豆腐アイス「とうふ愛す」が名物。
descEn: Located in Nagayu Onsen, a hot spring retreat long loved by writers and artists. At 450m elevation it stays cool even in summer, and is known for the highly carbonated Gozen-yu bath and 'tofu ice' dessert.

name: 道の駅 すごう
desc: 竹田市の玄関口、旧「竹田ドライブイン」がリニューアルした道の駅。九州有数のスイートコーン産地で、コーンソフトクリームが名物。
descEn: At the gateway to Taketa City, renovated from the former Taketa Drive-in. One of Kyushu's leading sweet corn producing areas, known for corn soft-serve.
